data.title: Eric Trump Pitched Buying The Bitcoin Dip When It Fell Below $90,000 — 5 Weeks Later, BTC Is Yet To Rip But Is There Still Hope?
data.description: Investors who might have heeded Eric Trump's advice and bought Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) dip have had little to rejoice, as the apex cryptocurrency has failed to chart a bullish reversal.

data.title: As Nvidia, Apple And Other Mag 7 Stocks Wipe Out Over $1 Trillion In Investor Wealth On Thursday, Top Analyst Warns Of 'Economic Armageddon' For Tech Sector If Current Tariffs Remain
data.description: On Thursday, the technology sector witnessed a major drop, with the Nasdaq closing 6% lower. This marked the most severe single-day decline for tech stocks in over five years.

data.title: Cliff Asness Slams Tariff Logic: 'Idiots Bray Like They've Scored A Point:' Warns Recession-Driven Deflation Isn't A Feature
data.description: Cliff Asness, Chief Investment Officer at AQR Capital Management, criticized proponents of tariffs Thursday, challenging claims that tariffs lead to deflation rather than inflation.

data.title: Volatility Gauge Vix Surges To An 8-Month High: 'More Fear Equals More Opportunity,' Says Analyst
data.description: The Cboe VIX zoomed 39.56% to close at 30.02 on Thursday following the tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump.

data.title: Nasdaq Dips 6% Following Trump's Tariffs As Nvidia, Apple Decline: Investor Sentiment Plunges, Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
